opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have zero energy, I'm getting up five times a night to pee, and the rash in my groin is burning and spreading.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The tiredness got so bad tonight I've been stuck in bed, I can't sleep because I keep needing to wee, and the rash in the fold of my groin has been getting worse and more painful over the last few days.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness has been creeping up over about two weeks and got much worse tonight; the groin rash started about three days ago
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly two weeks of worsening fatigue, three days of the rash
symptom_narrative.character: wiped-out, drained, no energy at all; the rash is red, raw, itchy and burning
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the tiredness is the worst it's been — I couldn't get the chores done and I'm just lying in bed; the rash is really sore
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the rash is in the crease of my right groin; the tiredness is all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: I'm waking up four or five times every night to pee, which is wrecking my sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: being on my feet makes me more exhausted; the rash stings more when the skin rubs
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've noticed I've been putting weight on around my belly over the past year and my waist has really gone up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this checked before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically bedbound tonight with the exhaustion and the soreness

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no medical conditions I've ever been told about — I've never really been tested for anything

family_history_as_reported.narrative: there's a lot of sugar diabetes in my family — my parents and a couple of my siblings have it, but I've never been formally tested myself

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I'll admit I drink a fair bit of soft drink and juice and eat a lot of quick processed food; I don't do much exercise
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone in a private residence, called out of hours because the tiredness and rash got bad tonight

objective_data_offered.value: 9.8 mmol/L on my home finger-prick sugar meter, taken about two hours after dinner
objective_data_offered.timing: about two hours after dinner tonight
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single random reading on an uncalibrated home glucometer, not a fasting venous sample; cannot confirm glycaemic category
patient's own estimate, not a calibrated scale

objective_data_offered.value: a bright red, raw, weepy patch in the crease of the right groin with smaller red spots dotted around the edge; it burns and itches
objective_data_offered.timing: shown on video during the call
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view only; depth, true extent of redness and whether deeper tissue is involved cannot be judged from video

objective_data_offered.value: dark, velvety, slightly thickened patches of skin in the folds of the neck and under the arms, plus several small soft skin tags around the neck
objective_data_offered.timing: shown on video during the call
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video observation described in lay terms; not a clinician dermatological assessment

objective_data_offered.value: no fever that I can feel and I don't feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective self-report; no thermometer reading provided
